description: Grepify — a lightweight code index for any harness. Declare target states as a function of source data; the Rust engine keeps them in sync, reprocessing only what changed.
rules: Use the Grepify v1 API (>=1.0.0): `import grepify as coco`, `@coco.fn` functions, `coco.App`, and `mount`/`use_mount`/`mount_each` for processing components.
FlowBuilder, flow_def, DataScope, DataSlice, transform_flow, add_collector/collect/export are pre-1.0 APIs that no longer exist — do not use them.
Declare target states through connector Target APIs (e.g. postgres.declare_table_target then target.declare_row, localfs declare_file) instead of exporting collectors.
Functions with memo=True must have full type annotations on all parameters and the return value.
There is no `grepify setup` step in v1: run apps with `grepify update` (add --live for live mode) or `app.update_blocking()` in Python.
